title: Diarra penalty enough to give Sunderland victory at Leeds
fullText: Habib Diarra scores the only goal from the penalty spot to give Sunderland a 1-0 win against Leeds at Elland Road in the Premier League.MATCH REPORT: Leeds United 0-1 SunderlandAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Habib Diarra scores the only goal from the penalty spot to give Sunderland a 1-0 win against Leeds at Elland Road in the Premier League.
